name: Slung Payload Magnetic Survey Configuration
description: You are preparing a drone for a magnetic survey with a sensitive magnetometer suspended on a 5-meter slung cable. Smooth kinematics and wide turns are required to prevent payload pendulum swing. Read the operations brief at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/mag_survey_protocol.txt for the exact flight parameters and mission geometry. Tune the required kinematic parameters (WPNAV_SPEED, WPNAV_ACCEL, ANGLE_MAX) to the values specified in the brief. Create a mission plan consisting of a takeoff to 40m, a 60-second delay for sensor warmup, a survey pattern (40m altitude, 15m spacing, 30m turnaround distance), and an RTL. Save the mission plan to /home/ga/Documents/QGC/slung_mag_survey.plan.
